macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: US Stocks Slide After Hot PPI Inflation Data
items.summary: The Dow Jones fell 0.5%, S&P 500 dropped 0.3%, and Nasdaq declined 0.4% on Wednesday amid hotter-than-expected PPI inflation readings. Investors awaited the Federal Reserve's policy decision and projections amid rising oil prices.

items.title: Fed Holds Rates Steady, Flags Inflation Risks from Oil Spike
items.summary: The Federal Reserve kept rates unchanged in the 3.5%-3.75% range, projecting one rate cut in 2026, while Chair Jerome Powell highlighted upside inflation risks from surging oil prices due to Iran-Israel tensions and sticky February PPI data.

items.title: Major Indices Plunge Post-Fed: S&P Down 1.36%, Nasdaq 1.46%
items.summary: Following the Fed's decision, the S&P 500 fell 1.36% to around 6625, Nasdaq dropped 1.46%, Dow and Russell 2000 also declined sharply amid hotter inflation and oil surge to $108 Brent.

items.title: 10-Year Yield Surges Above 4.2% After FOMC Update
items.summary: The 10-year Treasury yield pushed above 4.2%, pressuring growth stocks, while oil faced resistance at $98.11 amid Fed's hawkish dot plot shift on inflation and economy running hotter than expected.

items.title: Small-Cap Stocks Poised for Revival in 2026
items.summary: Small-cap indexes have outperformed large-caps over the last six months and could continue amid falling rates, broadening growth, and attractive valuations, per Morningstar's 2026 Outlook.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: US Regulators Clarify Crypto Asset Classification, Boosting Market Confidence
items.summary: U.S. regulators have adopted a clearer stance on crypto asset classification, reducing uncertainty, aiding institutional entry, and favoring Bitcoin and Ethereum over speculative altcoins. This shift is driving capital redistribution toward infrastructure-focused networks amid rising tokenization trends.

items.title: Bitcoin Drops 3.9% to $71,044; Ethereum Falls 5.7% Amid Fed Rate Hold
items.summary: The crypto market declined broadly with Bitcoin down 3.9% to $71,044 and Ethereum down 5.7% to $2,192.58, driven by weak risk sentiment, ETF outflows, and Fed maintaining rates at 3.50–3.75%. River surged 18.5% on high volume, while Solana dropped 4.7%.

items.title: Senate Eyes Stablecoin Yield Compromise by Week's End
items.summary: Senate Banking Committee Chair Tim Scott anticipates a compromise on stablecoin yield rules soon, potentially removing barriers to U.S. stablecoin legislation and enhancing institutional adoption if yield-bearing stablecoins are allowed.

items.title: BlackRock Withdraws $618M in BTC; ETFs See Major Inflows
items.summary: BlackRock pulled 8,435 BTC ($618 million) from Coinbase over three days, signaling institutional accumulation. U.S. Bitcoin ETFs added 2,492 BTC net, and Ethereum ETFs gained 13,478 ETH, showing strong demand despite price dips.

items.title: $438M Token Unlocks Loom, Including ZRO, BARD, and River
items.summary: Over $438 million in tokens like ZRO, BARD, and RIVER are set to unlock this week, likely heightening market volatility amid ongoing declines and Fed projections.

items.title: Tokenization Trends Strengthen Institutional Blockchain Adoption
items.summary: Tokenization of stocks and bonds is advancing beyond experiments, positioning blockchain as core market infrastructure and favoring cryptocurrencies enabling transactions, issuance, and on-chain liquidity.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Pokémon TCG Perfect Order Prerelease Tournament Sanctioned
items.summary: A Pokémon Trading Card Game Premier Event for the 2026 Perfect Order Prerelease was sanctioned on March 18 at Rip N Ship Gaming.

items.title: Octavian Gaming Launches Titles on Novibet in Mexico
items.summary: Octavian Gaming announced the go-live of its game portfolio with Novibet, a major online gaming platform in Mexico, expanding its presence in the region.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Tait Communications Launches OpenTrunk Shared Control Channel Solution
items.summary: Tait Communications announced the Tait OpenTrunk shared control channel solution based on DMR Tier 3 technology for spectrum-constrained industries like education and transportation. The standards-based portfolio, including radios and infrastructure, will be available from April 1 and is showcased at IWCE 2026 in Las Vegas.

items.title: IONNA Celebrates Second Anniversary with 100+ EV Charging Sites Live
items.summary: EV charging joint venture IONNA, backed by BMW, GM, Honda, Hyundai and others, marked its second anniversary with over 100 live sites, a new discount program with General Motors, and expansions including Amazon Just Walk Out tech stores. The network supports nationwide road trips with high-power NACS chargers.

items.title: Robotics and Automation 2026 Exhibition Opens with 200+ Exhibitors and Product Demos
items.summary: The Robotics and Automation 2026 event opened on March 18 at NEC Birmingham, featuring over 200 exhibitors, 60+ conference sessions, live demos from Ocado, SensoPart, Elite Robots, and others in robotics, machine vision, and automation. Co-located shows cover intralogistics and supply chain tech.
